author: cms-tsg-storm
body:
backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51107

#### PR description:

Development of HLT menus for `CMSSW_16_0_X`:
   * This is the PR for the `16_1_X branch` (this is the release cycle currently used for Run-3 HLT-menu development).

These updates correspond to the updates corresponding to the second version **"V1.1" of the HIon menu** for the 2026 PbPb data-taking.
This update includes the integration of the following JIRA tickets:
- [CMSHLT-3853](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3853) [HIN,NGT] Integration of HLT scouting path for feeding HLT Test Stand and NGT demonstrator DQM during PbPb run
- [CMSHLT-3854](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3854) [HIN] New UPC trigger path `HLT_HIUPC_SingleMuOpen_BptxAND_MaxPixelCluster10000` for HIon
- [CMSHLT-3855](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3855) [HIN,TRK] Re-enable `HIHLTMonitor` stream
- [CMSHLT-3859](https://its.cern.ch/jira/browse/CMSHLT-3859) [HIN] Porting online configuration to offline HIon table

In addition this PR introduces the following commits:
- 020243152e3ec2fcc7cbef2cd455d42e2b0fda77: update `hltPathOwners.json` for HIon menu 2026 V1.1

#### PR validation:

TSG integration tests.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51107 to the current TSG production cycle (`CMSSW_16_1_X`)
title: HLT menu development for `16_1_X` (2/N)
